title: Procedure for incurring and refunding debt and issuing bonds
doc_html:
§184.  Procedure for incurring and refunding debt and issuing bonds

The manner and method of incurring and refunding debt and issuing negotiable bonds hereunder shall be in every respect the same as that prescribed in Chapter 4, Sub-title II of Title 39.
doc_text:
§184.  Procedure for incurring and refunding debt and issuing bonds
The manner and method of incurring and refunding debt and issuing negotiable bonds hereunder shall be in every respect the same as that prescribed in Chapter 4, Sub-title II of Title 39.
